name: Heimer Law Offices P.C.
description_short: Austin-area bankruptcy law office specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings across Central Texas counties. Offers flexible payment plans to help clients eliminate debt and avoid foreclosure.
description_long:
Heimer Law Offices P.C. is a bankruptcy law firm based in Austin, Texas, serving a five-county region including Travis, Williamson, Hays, Bastrop, and Burnet Counties. The firm focuses exclusively on personal bankruptcy law, positioning itself as a resource for individuals overwhelmed by debt or facing foreclosure. Their marketing emphasizes debt relief and fresh financial starts rather than litigation or business services.

The firm offers Chapter 7 bankruptcy filings, which typically discharge unsecured debt, and Chapter 13 reorganization filings, which establish repayment plans. A key advertised feature is flexible payment plans for filing fees, acknowledging that bankruptcy filers often have limited liquid assets. They emphasize practical outcomes: allowing clients to retain homes and vehicles while stopping creditor collections efforts.

Hheimer Law Offices differentiates itself through geographic specificity (five-county service area), availability (phone contact: 512-291-7105), and client-focused messaging about asset protection and stopping harassment. Their emphasis on "making a fresh start" targets emotionally distressed debtors. The flexible payment arrangement for legal fees addresses a common barrier for bankruptcy clients.

Limitations include no information on attorney credentials, experience level, initial consultation costs, success rates, or client reviews on the website. The firm provides no detail on Chapter 13 payment plan negotiation track record or post-bankruptcy financial counseling. Geographic service is limited to Central Texas, and no information indicates whether they handle commercial bankruptcy, appeals, or complex multi-state cases.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers flexible payment plans for Chapter 7 filing fees, addressing cash flow barriers for debt-distressed clients
Serves five-county region with clear geographic boundaries (Travis, Williamson, Hays, Bastrop, Burnet)
Direct phone contact available (512-291-7105) for immediate consultation inquiries
Explicitly advertises debt discharge outcomes and creditor contact stoppage, setting clear expectations
Emphasizes asset protection (home and car retention) as a primary benefit for Chapter 7 filers
Physical office location in Austin with accessible address (6633 U.S. Highway 290)
cons: Website contains no attorney credentials, bar status, experience level, or specialization certifications
No information on Chapter 13 plan success rates, average payoff timelines, or creditor negotiation outcomes
No mention of initial consultation fees, cost transparency, or total average filing costs
No client testimonials, case results, or performance metrics provided on website
Limited scope to personal bankruptcy only; no information on handling complex, multi-state, or business bankruptcies
best_for: Central Texas residents with unsecured debt seeking Chapter 7 discharge without immediate access to large legal fees
Homeowners or car owners in foreclosure or repossession facing creditor harassment
Individuals overwhelmed by debt who need straightforward Chapter 13 reorganization with local attorney representation
diagnosis: Heimer Law Offices is best for Central Texas residents with moderate-to-high unsecured debt who need straightforward Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 representation and benefit from flexible fee payment options. Primary caveat: the website lacks attorney credentials, case results, and cost transparency, requiring direct contact to verify qualifications and obtain detailed fee information before engagement.
services: Flexible payment plans for legal fees
Debt discharge and unsecured debt elimination
Foreclosure prevention and home retention assistance
Creditor contact and collection call cessation
Bankruptcy case management across Travis, Williamson, Hays, Bastrop, and Burnet Counties
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
